stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The Certificate of Airworthiness (CofA) of the figure mentions: “A current Airworthiness Review Certificate (ARC) shall be attached to this Certificate.” Which requirement must be met for the aircraft to be legally permitted to operate?

options.a: The Certificate of Airworthiness must be dated later than the flight.
options.b: The Certificate of Airworthiness must be accompanied by a current Airworthiness Review Certificate (ARC).
options.c: The Certificate of Airworthiness must be renewed before every flight.
options.d: The Certificate of Airworthiness must be signed by the commander before departure.
